answer.en: A JSON Beautifier formats compact or minified JSON by adding proper indentation and line breaks, making it easy to read and understand.

question.en: Is JSON Beautifier the same as JSON Formatter?

answer.en: Yes. The terms JSON Beautifier, JSON Formatter, and JSON Pretty Printer all refer to the same operation: adding whitespace to improve readability.
Yes. You can choose between 2-space, 4-space, or tab indentation.
Completely. All processing happens in your browser — nothing is uploaded to any server.

description.en: All processing runs locally in your browser. Nothing is uploaded to any server.
